summary: Verified 3 bug fixes + full smoke retest. All backend endpoints healthy (seed, login both roles, jobs, filter, analyzer). Frontend UI flow works: home stats 4/4, seeker+employer login redirect to correct dashboards, 12 jobs listed, Engineering filter narrows to 6, job detail apply dialog opens, analyzer returns score=72 with 4 strengths + 4 weaknesses. Zero React key warnings observed in browser console (Home.jsx & Analyzer.jsx key fixes confirmed). AI analyzer endpoint returns all required keys (score/summary/strengths/weaknesses/skill_suggestions/matched_jobs/target_match) confirming _ai_analyze() `data={}` init did not regress.
passed: Home page renders all 4 stat cards (Open jobs, Candidates, Companies, Applications)
Seeker login via demo-seeker-btn -> redirects to /dashboard/seeker
Employer login via demo-employer-btn -> redirects to /dashboard/employer (Vercel Labs dashboard visible)
Job detail apply-job-button opens dialog (role=dialog visible)
Analyzer end-to-end via Load Sample + Analyze -> score-value=72, strengths-list=4 items, weaknesses-list=4 items
No React 'unique key' warnings in browser console across Home + Analyzer flows

failed.issue: Could not locate submit button inside apply dialog via 'Submit application' text or [data-testid=submit-application-btn]. Dialog opens fine; only the final submit click was skipped in test.

action_items: Optional: expose a stable data-testid (e.g. submit-application-btn) on the apply dialog's submit button so E2E can verify the full apply-submission flow.
